temporal_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a man sitting in an office chair. He has dark hair and is dressed in a light blue button-down shirt with a dark, diagonally striped tie. The background is a professional office setting, with a window covered by horizontal blinds visible behind him. To the right, a blue filing cabinet or office furniture is partially in view. In the top left corner of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in white. The camera remains static throughout the clip. The audio consists of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A gentle, somber melody, likely played on a string instrument, creates a pensive and slightly sad atmosphere. The man initially looks down with a somber expression, his hands occupied with an object just out of frame. He then lifts his head, his gaze shifting slightly as he continues to manipulate the object, which appears to be a small, dark item. The music is quiet and reflective, evoking a sense of quiet contemplation or disappointment. There is no dialogue or other sound effects present.
